titleStmt.title: SII 37.134: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 134. (A.R. No. B 5 of 1940.) Cheṇḍuvāyi, Siddhavatam Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: On a slab in a field (Survey No. 50) near the satra.
This is dated Śaka 1241, [Si]ddhārthin, Śrāvana, śu. 15, Wednesday, Lunar eclipse corresponding to 1319 A.D., August 1.

It records the grant of several incomes such as rāchasrōtriyam, the arigōrupannu and kāṇika in the village Chaṇḍuvāyi situated in Sakhali-bhūmi for the food offerings to the god Siddhanāthadēva by Rudraya-Leṁka, the younger brother of Mahāpradhāni Juṭṭaya-Leṁka was ruling over Pottapi, Sakhali and Mulkināḍu. The donor Rudraya-Leṁka has taken a sacred both on the day of lunar eclipse and staying at Kaḍapa in Mulkināḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1241 Agunēṭi si
ddātti saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa su 15 bunāṁḍu svasti .
śrī śrī pa¨rvvata dakṣaṇa dvāratī¨rttha pari
pālituṁḍaina śrīsiddanādhadēvuniki svasti
śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kākatiyya pratāparudra
dēvamahārājulu sukha saṁgatā vinōdaṁ
bunanu prithivirājyamu sēyucuṁḍaṁgānu
svasti śrī manmahāpradhāni kaṭṭakōlanāyeṁku
layina juṭṭayaleṁkaṁgāru pōttapi bhūmi sa
khalibhūmi mulikināṁṭi bhūmiyaṁdu rājya
mu sēyucunuṁḍi vāri taṁmuṁḍu rudrayaleṁka
ṁgāru mulkisāṁṭilōni kaḍapanuṁḍi sōma
grahaṇa kālamunaṁdu tī¨rttamāḍi sakhili
bhūmilōni ceṁḍuvāya catuśīma yaṁ
dūnu rācasrōtriyamu Arigāru paṁ
nulu kānikalu sahitamayena saka ya
sahitamuṁgānu śrīsiddanādha dēvuniki
ma ṁ nalla sa mu [Ā]hārānaku Ācaṁ
drā¨rkkasthāyegā mahārājukuṁ puṁṇya
mugānu sa¨rvvamāṁnyaṁgānu dārāpū
¨rvvakamu śēśi yistimi . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
śrī śrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yo harēti va
suṁddarāṁ . ṣaṣṭhi¨rvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyāṁyēt krimiḥ . sva
dattāṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ .
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . ye
śāsanaṁ varaguḍiki
ni siddaya koḍuku muttavrāyi
. vamastu . Oka Akhaṁḍa dīpamūnu celaṁ galadi
Digital edition of SII 37.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
